steps.name: Select 'A transaction flow' company using filter
Select 'The merchant' business unit using filter
Verify: transaction status in the table

Get cell for column 'Status' in transaction id.transaction.KRXmDA7oTorybh4XuvtbqTkZ8Qcl5y0fP3vdkVCTso1nJ1YnSLmHMBo7pe2qFmT0IPX-Nw_ULg7OrTZtFcSP8P5fufS7xLb3PQH98N19rPLxSQ9RGivynP5kCnkFj_P-6WjnfRTqgPfaUF80DBU3ZQ
